issues.sample: I WAS DRIVING ON THE HIGHWAY AT 55-75 MILES PER HOUR. I SAW AN ORANGE INDICATOR LIGHT FOR THE 'GLOW PLUG SYSTEM' APPEAR, WITH NO PREVIOUS WARNING. I CONTINUED TO DRIVE FOR SEVERAL MINUTES, BUT FELT A LOSS OF POWER. THE ACCELERATOR WHEN DEPRESSED DID NOT RESPOND WITH POWER. I WAS

narrative.headline: What 2014 Audi Q7 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 44 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel/Propulsion System (25% of reports).
